import React from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import './Services.css'; // CSS फाईल इम्पोर्ट करा function Services() { const serviceData = [ { id: 1, title: "Web Development", icon: "fas fa-code", desc: "Modern, responsive websites built with React and Node.js.", color: "primary" }, { id: 2, title: "UI/UX Design", icon: "fas fa-paint-brush", desc: "Creative and user-friendly interface designs.", color: "danger" }, { id: 3, title: "App Development", icon: "fas fa-mobile-alt", desc: "Custom Android and iOS applications.", color: "success" }, { id: 4, title: "Assignment Support", icon: "fas fa-book-open", desc: "Expert help for academic projects and assignments.", color: "warning" }, { id: 5, title: "PPT Design", icon: "fas fa-file-powerpoint", desc: "Professional presentations for business and college.", color: "info" }, { id: 6, title: "Report Writing", icon: "fas fa-file-alt", desc: "Detailed technical and business report writing.", color: "secondary" }, { id: 7, title: "Digital Marketing", icon: "fas fa-bullhorn", desc: "Grow your online presence with social media ads.", color: "dark" }, { id: 8, title: "Content Writing", icon: "fas fa-pen-nib", desc: "High-quality blog posts and creative writing.", color: "pink" }, { id: 9, title: "SEO Optimization", icon: "fas fa-search-plus", desc: "Improve your website ranking on search engines.", color: "teal" } ]; return (

My Professional Services

Tailored solutions for your digital and academic success.

{serviceData.map((service) => (

{service.title}

{service.desc}

Get Started
))}

How I Work?

{['Consultation', 'Strategy & Design', 'Final Delivery'].map((step, index) => (
{index + 1}
{step}

Professional step-by-step process to ensure quality.

))}
); } export default Services;
